title: Brass Circular Tray with Etched Design – Tribal Geometric Bohemian Design - Gold Color Large Round Serving Dish Platter, Coffee Table Decorative Tray - Boho Home Decor or Kitchen Decor
features: Designer Style: This stylish 12" tray features a raised edge with a unique bohemian, tribal, geomatric pattern and design. The shiny brass adds a touch of style, elegance, and sophistication to any room in your home. Brass has that timeless vintage feel combined with this modern, contemporary style.

Versatility: Brass trays and serving platters are a unique addition for your bar or kitchenware collection. Perfect for special occasions, meals, parties, events, weddings, etc. Also ideal for everyday use to display or decorate on the bar, vanity, counter, dresser, coffee table, side table, bathroom, bedroom, kitchen or dining room.

Handmade: Each of these one of kind trays is handcrafted with care by our talented artisans making each brass tray unique. This tray features a unique hammering technique and is stamped on the bottom with the Luene name so you know it is authentic.

Unique Gifts: These brass serving platters are the perfect unique gift for someone who appreciates style. Perfect for Mother’s Day, birthdays, anniversaries, housewarming, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Rosh Hashanah, Eid al-Fitr, and more. Brass is the traditional and modern gift for a 21st Anniversary, symbolizing durability and strength, just like your marriage.

Coated with a Food-safe Lacquer: These lead-free aluminum trays are brass plated and coated with a food-safe lacquer to resist tarnish and keep your tray looking bright and shiny. We recommend handwashing only with mild detergents and a soft cloth.
description: This circular brass plated tray features a unique etched design. This 12" large round tray measures is the perfect serving dish size for your next party, special meal, holiday, or event. Featuring a bohemian, tribal, geometric pattern and design, this designer tray can also be used as a beautiful accent piece for any room in your home or for your home bar. The shiny brass finish adds a special touch to any style of home décor, so feel free to mix with your vintage, contemporary, mid-century or modern style. Brass is the traditional and modern gift for a 21st Anniversary, symbolizing durability and strength. This tray is handmade, making each one unique and from the Luene brand you can trust. Coated with a food-safe lacquer, these trays will maintain their lustre and shine for years to come. So, gift one to yourself or someone you love. Backed by our 100% satisfaction guarantee, we know you will love this tray!
